description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property set within a landscaped lot featuring numerous trees and green spaces. The main building complex is composed of several interconnected sections with dark, multi-angled hip and gable roofs, giving it a sprawling, estate-like appearance. The property is bordered by a prominent, solid wall or fence on one side, providing privacy and separation from the surroundings. The front area includes a paved driveway and a formal entrance, flanked by manicured lawns and decorative shrubbery. Windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, with some larger panes and others smaller, suggesting a mix of private and communal spaces inside. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort, privacy, and integration with the landscape.
description: A large, multi-section house with dark, complex roofs, surrounded by landscaped lawns, trees, and a prominent boundary wall. The property features a paved driveway, asymmetrical windows, and a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the boundary wall, and the arrangement of green spaces and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sections of the house, additional green areas, and the solid boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's multi-section layout, more trees, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Formal entryway with a paved driveway, steps, and a covered porch flanked by landscaping and decorative elements.
